$comment: Simplification metadata for a coord_precision-rounded GeoJSON. Records the rounding tolerance + feature counts so downstream area/length math is not silently lying. Per TODO/TN-GRANULAR-GEO-PLAN.md Phase 1b (Hans v2 nit).
title: Tamil Nadu villages (per district), LGD-keyed
description: Per-village polygons for Tamil Nadu, split per district. Geometries coordinate-rounded to 4 decimal places (~11 m) at emit time. The companion S22-villages-index.json lists which districts have a shard on disk so the frontend loader can skip 404-probing.
